chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of One Who Provides Iftar to a Fasting Person

text: 1952 - رَوَى أَبُو اَلصَّبَّاحِ اَلْكِنَانِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «مَنْ فَطَّرَ صَائِماً فَلَهُ أَجْرٌ مِثْلُهُ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1952 - Abu al-Sabbah al-Kinani narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"Whoever provides iftar to a fasting person will have a reward equal to that of the fasting person."
